title: MDN Web Docs: Web Storage API
description: Complete reference for the Web Storage API including localStorage and sessionStorage, methods, properties, and examples.

title: Web Storage Specification (W3C)
description: Official W3C HTML Living Standard specification for Web Storage, defining the formal API and behavior.

title: localStorage vs sessionStorage — Stack Overflow
description: Community discussion and comparison table highlighting the differences between localStorage and sessionStorage with code examples.

title: How to Check if localStorage is Available
description: MDN guide showing the recommended pattern for detecting whether the browser supports localStorage in both normal and private browsing modes.

title: Cross-Tab Communication with the Storage Event
description: SitePoint tutorial on using the storage event to synchronize data across browser tabs and windows in real-time.

title: localStorage QuotaExceededError Handling
description: HTML5 Rocks research article on storage quotas across browsers and patterns for handling QuotaExceededError gracefully.

title: Storing Objects in localStorage (JSON Pattern)
description: Tutorial covering the JSON.stringify/JSON.parse pattern for storing and retrieving JavaScript objects from localStorage.

title: Interactive localStorage Explorer
description: W3Schools interactive tutorial and playground for experimenting with localStorage setItem, getItem, and removeItem operations.

title: localStorage Encryption Best Practices
description: OWASP guidelines on securing Web Storage, including why sensitive data should never be stored in localStorage without encryption.

title: IndexedDB as a localStorage Alternative
description: MDN reference for IndexedDB, the asynchronous NoSQL database available in browsers for storing large amounts of structured data.

title: Web Storage: A Beginner's Guide
description: freeCodeCamp comprehensive guide covering localStorage and sessionStorage with detailed code examples and project ideas.

title: Chrome Storage Partitioning (Privacy Sandbox)
description: Google developer documentation on storage partitioning in Chrome, affecting how third-party embedded content accesses Web Storage.

title: Service Workers and Storage API
description: MDN guide on using Service Workers with Cache API and IndexedDB as alternatives to localStorage which is unavailable in worker contexts.

title: React hooks for localStorage
description: Popular custom React hook for synchronizing state with localStorage, with SSR safety and JSON serialization built in.

title: Storage API Wrapper Libraries Comparison
description: store.js — a cross-browser localStorage wrapper that normalizes the API and provides polyfills for older browsers.
